description: Step-by-step trace of skills_uri fabrication for apps/api/fixtures/cv/cv_fixture_v0.txt, captured via scripts/runtime_smoke.py.

sub_steps: _normalize_text: lowercase + strip_accents + PUNCT_PATTERN([^\w\s])-> spaces + WHITESPACE_PATTERN collapse
per-word loop: keep if len>=MIN_TOKEN_LENGTH(2) AND not in STOPWORDS AND not isdigit
bigram whitelist adjacency check over words (BIGRAM_WHITELIST)
trigram whitelist adjacency check over words (TRIGRAM_WHITELIST)
whitelist capture via regex rf'\\b{skill}\\b' — NOTE: double-backslash in raw f-string makes literal backslash-b, effectively dead code
final filter: token not in STOPWORDS and len>=MIN_TOKEN_LENGTH
raw_tokens_sample: gestion de projets par méthode agile

present_via_SKILL_ALIASES: utiliser un logiciel de tableur      <- excel
gestion de projets par méthode agile <- agile/project_management
expected_but_ABSENT_from_raw_tokens: machine learning  (bigram in BIGRAM_WHITELIST, present in CV body, not captured)
apprentissage automatique  (SKILL_ALIASES['machine learning']='apprentissage automatique' — not added because bigram not captured)
logiciel de visualisation des données  (SKILL_ALIASES['dashboards'] expansion — 'dashboards' IS in raw_tokens but expansion not present)
techniques de présentation visuelle    (same — SKILL_ALIASES['dashboards'] second entry)
docker  (alias self-maps to 'docker' — present in raw_tokens, but map_skill later fails)
git     (alias self-maps to 'git' — survives, map_skill resolves via alt_to_uri)
expansion_observations.cause_unverified: Inconsistency in SKILL_ALIASES expansion coverage observed but not root-caused. Reported as-is.

sub_steps: _has_noise filter: reject if '@' in token OR regex \\d matches digit OR len<3 OR token in STOPWORDS
alias pre-pass: load_alias_map() -> esco_alias_fr_v0.jsonl lookup by alias_key(token)=canon+strip_accents
notes: _has_noise applies on lowercased token after dedup.

Tokens like 'sales', 'data', 'project', 'data analysis', 'project management', 'programming' go to map_skill but match NO ESCO preferred/alt label exactly — dropped as filtered_tokens. Their SKILL_ALIASES-expanded form (e.g., 'argumentaire de vente', 'analyse de données', 'gestion de projets par méthode agile') was added to raw_tokens upstream and is what actually survives.
map_skill(enable_fuzzy=False) => only canon()-exact matches on preferred_to_uri and alt_to_uri succeed.

method_order: exact match: canon_skill in store.preferred_to_uri  -> confidence 1.0, method='preferred_label'
exact match: canon_skill in store.alt_to_uri        -> confidence 0.95, method='dictionary_alt_label'
(fuzzy match is DISABLED for this pipeline — enable_fuzzy=False)

mapped_15_tokens_to_15_uris_traced.origin: city name in CV — ESCO has a concept 'paris' (bet/wager) at http://data.europa.eu/esco/skill/2cc75284-f385-42d6-9b70-8262bc6c603a (cross-domain collision)
SKILL_ALIASES expansion from 'data'/'analyse'/'analyst'/'data analysis' (surface in raw_tokens)

mapped_15_tokens_to_15_uris_traced.surface_token: gestion de projets par méthode agile
mapped_15_tokens_to_15_uris_traced.mapped_label: gestion de projets par méthode Agile
outils d’extraction de transformation et de chargement
mapped_15_tokens_to_15_uris_traced.origin: ESCO alt_to_uri match on 'etl' (ESCO preferred label in French is the long form)

mapped_15_tokens_to_15_uris_traced.mapped_label: outils de gestion de configuration logicielle
mapped_15_tokens_to_15_uris_traced.origin: ESCO alt_to_uri match on 'git' (ESCO preferred label is the general concept, not the tool)

kept_via_alias_jsonl_layer_2.mapped_label: analyse de données (dedup — URI already present)

step_C_mapping.note_reporting_dedup: Alias 'reporting' points to URI http://data.europa.eu/esco/skill/97bd1c21-66b2-4b7e-ad0f-e3cda590e378 ('analyse de données') — same URI already produced by 'data' expansion. dedup by URI set -> only counted once in validated_items. alias_hits_count=2 but skills_uri final count still 17.

CRITICAL_code_finding.production_path_line_86: skills_uri = [item.get('uri') for item in validated_items if item.get('uri')]
CRITICAL_code_finding.debug_only_path_lines_92_121: A SECOND map_skill loop + collapse_to_uris(mapped_items) is executed, but it populates ONLY skills_uri_collapsed_dupes and skills_dupes for debug metrics. It does NOT overwrite skills_uri. The skills_uri actually shipped to /inbox comes straight from strict_filter_skills.validated_items.
CRITICAL_code_finding.implication: collapse_to_uris is OFF the production scoring path. The real dedup is performed inside strict_filter_skills (seen_uris set at line 101). The Flow Map chain description 'collapse_to_uris -> skills_uri' is a shadow computation, not the actual source of the shipped field.

step_D_collapse.interpretation: 1 collapsed dupe reflects that both 'excel' (via SKILL_ALIASES) and 'utiliser un logiciel de tableur' (via SKILL_ALIASES) map to the same URI. Metric is for observability only.

profile.skills: outils d’extraction de transformation et de chargement
gestion de projets par méthode Agile
outils de gestion de configuration logicielle
